content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   Online banking   NAB Connect online banking   NAB Connect help   Admin and Forms   Forms and product applications   Forms and product applications   Our useful guides will help you understand forms and products in NAB Connect.  Making amendments  Learn how to apply changes in NAB Connect.  Add a new service   Add a new account under a different business   Service descriptions   View and update your payment authorisation rules   Applying for a new product  Learn about the different products in NAB Connect, including how to apply for new products and how you can set them up.  Apply for a specialised service in NAB Connect   Apply for MT940 reporting   Set up account package integration   Set up automated reporting   Apply for a new Direct Entry Credit User ID   Other related guides  More information to help you navigate NAB Connect.  View and approve your online amendments   Request a service via secure message   Authorising User or Administrator identification form   Change user types   NAB Connect and business channels terms and conditions   Did you know   NAB Connect training webinars   Join our NAB Connect training webinars to learn more about how you can maximise the functions in NAB Connect.  See our NAB Connect webinars   Related help and support   See some of our other useful information to help with your banking.  Daylight savings and public holiday payment processing   Check out our daylight savings and public holiday payment processing guide for NAB Connect.  NAB Connect training   Join us for a NAB Connect training webinar to learn more about NAB Connect functionality.  NAB Connect security features   Learn more about the features and controls that help stop fraud and misuse.   Important information  This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.
